scripts.setup:
# bundle, create db, migrate, run seeds
bin/setup

# install frontend deps
npm install
scripts.run:
# Free ports (Rails 3000, Vite 5173, SSR 13714) and clear stale pidfile
lsof -ti :3000 -ti :5173 -ti :13714 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f tmp/pids/server.pid
bin/dev
scripts.archive:
# Frontend deps
rm -rf node_modules

# Vite build output
rm -rf public/vite ssr tmp/rails-vite.json

# Rails tmp + logs
rm -rf tmp/cache tmp/pids tmp/sockets tmp/storage
rm -f log/*.log
